capture_requirements: immutable append-only revision ledger per (game_pk, side)
preserve every revision with observed_at + source + version
observed_before_cutoff computed against the frozen prediction_cutoff
probable-to-actual divergence computed only after grading, stored separately, never fed as a pregame feature
hard_rule: Postgame actual starters MUST NOT be used as historical pregame replacements. Starter-workload features must be tied to the exact selected starter SNAPSHOT observed strictly before the prediction cutoff.
purpose: Capture immutable FORWARD (pregame, point-in-time) evidence for every game and every starter revision, so that starter-dependent features (pitcher, workload) can EVENTUALLY be built from cutoff-known probable starters instead of postgame actual starters.

fields.actual_starter_after_grading: int|null (postgame; for divergence audit ONLY, never a pregame feature)
fields.observed_at: iso8601 (collector observation time; NEVER treated as publication time)
fields.source_publication_time: iso8601|null (null when the source does not supply distinct publication time)

usage_policy.historical_pitcher_workload: may remain RESEARCH DIAGNOSTICS ONLY until cutoff-known probable starters exist
usage_policy.live: the live collector already captures forward probable-starter snapshots; this contract formalizes the revision ledger + divergence monitoring for future starter-uncertainty modelling
usage_policy.promotion: no pitcher- or workload-dependent historical model may be promoted; the admissible historical promotion core (NRFI_CORE_V2_2_ADMISSIBLE) excludes starter-dependent domains
